heading: Atlas Resource Policy Examples
body:
Copy and modify the following example policies to use for your organization.
All examples use [Cedar policy language](https://docs.cedarpolicy.com/), but for the Atlas Administration API, the examples are wrapped
in JSON (Javascript Object Notation) so you can paste them directly into your API (Application Programming Interface) calls.
To learn more, see [Create an Atlas Resource Policy Configuration](procedure-create-atlas-resource-policy).

Atlas Administration API

Atlas UI

Terraform
